## Description

<!-- Describe the change and link to any related issues. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation
- [ ] refactor — code restructuring
- [ ] chore — build, tooling, dependencies
- [ ] ci — CI/CD changes
- [ ] security — security fix

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `cargo check` passes
- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-facing change)
